content: That depends on personal preference! Being in a real-life version of The Walking Dead would mean facing human threats and survival challenges, while Jurassic Park would involve the danger of dinosaurs. Many might choose Jurassic Park for the thrill of adventure, but both scenarios would be extremely perilous.
